headline: a2 Platinum USA Label Infant Formula Recalled Because of Possible Health Risk

image.caption: a2 Platinum USA Label Infant Formula Recalled Because of Possible Health Risk

description: a2 announced a recall involving a2 Platinum Premium Infant Formula 0-12 months USA label after issues linked to presence of cereulide toxin produced by some...
keywords: a2 Platinum Premium Infant Formula 0-12 months USA label
Presence of cereulide toxin produced by some strains of the bacterium Bacillus cereus

content.subtitle: Recall Summary
content.text:
The a2 Milk Company has voluntarily recalled three specific batches of a2 Platinum Premium Infant Formula 0-12 months USA label due to the presence of cereulide toxin produced by Bacillus cereus. The formula was sold exclusively in the United States through the company’s website, Amazon, and Meijer stores under Operation Fly Formula. Although no illnesses have been confirmed, cereulide is heat-stable and can cause gastrointestinal symptoms such as nausea and vomiting, with infants being particularly vulnerable to complications like dehydration.

The recall affects a total of 63,078 units across three batches, with approximately 16,428 units already sold. The affected batches are identified by batch number and expiration date printed on the bottom of each tin. The product has been discontinued and removed from sale prior to this recall. This action follows detection of cereulide after updated testing prompted by new regulatory guidance in New Zealand. The U.S. Food and Drug Administration is aware of this recall.

Consumers who have these products should stop using them immediately. Infants showing symptoms after consumption should see a healthcare provider. Reports of adverse events related to this product can be submitted to the FDA through their MedWatch system.

Batch Number Use By (Expiration Date) Units Recalled
Batch 1 Not specified in source Not specified in source
Batch 2 Not specified in source Not specified in source
Batch 3 Not specified in source Not specified in source

For more information and to report adverse events, visit FDA MedWatch.

facts.product: a2 Platinum Premium Infant Formula 0-12 months USA label
facts.reason: Presence of cereulide toxin produced by some strains of the bacterium Bacillus cereus

content.subtitle: What You Should Do
content.text: Consumers who have purchased a2 Platinum Premium Infant Formula 0-12 months with the USA label should check product details for affected lots due to the presence of cereulide toxin produced by Bacillus cereus. If you have this product and have concerns or need assistance, contact A2 Milk Company at (844) 422-6455 for support and guidance.

content.subtitle: Source and Verification
content.text: According to the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA), this recall notice was published on 2026-05-02.
authorityLinks: Read the official FDA recall notice on the FDA website.
Review consumer support information on the company website.

disclaimer: When a company announces a recall, market withdrawal, or safety alert, the FDA posts the company's announcement as a public service. FDA does not endorse either the product or the company.
